title: [release-1.13] Fix for CVE-2023-39325
body:
Updated golang.org/x/net to v0.17.0

Skopeo isn't affected by the vulnerability, but this change will help to
silence security scanners.


Ref: https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-4374-p667-p6c8

comments.body: @lsm5 on the off-chance that you have done a go vendoring before, checkout https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/main/install.md#vendoring
